fault_hypothesis: The `overlaps` function on line 68 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) to check for non-overlapping bands, which incorrectly classifies adjacent (touching) bands as non-overlapping.

constraints.intent: Bands considered non-overlapping must have a clear gap between them, not just touch at a boundary.
Each existing band that is checked and does not cause an early return must be strictly non-overlapping with the candidate.

spec.expr: all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: If the candidate is added to the list, it must not have overlapped (including touching) any existing band.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result[0] == False or all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: A successful reservation implies the candidate did not overlap (including touching) any of the original bands.
